_comment: Use with POST /api/v1/products body: { "products": [ ... ] }. Required fields match your Product model today. Optional fields are read by funzora-web enrichProduct() if you add them to mongoose schema (otherwise Mongo strips them).

requiredFieldsPerProduct.name: Magic Kinetic Sand
requiredFieldsPerProduct.description: Squeeze, mould and sculpt endlessly! Non-toxic kinetic sand.
requiredFieldsPerProduct.specification:
Non-toxic BPA-free
Never dries out
Easy cleanup
500g pack

products.name: Bubble Wand Super Kit
products.description: Giant wands and solution for outdoor bubble fun.
